move_black_garment_to_upper_left.query: a worker lifts a black garment with both hands and moves it to the upper-left side of the worktable
move_black_garment_to_upper_left.prompt:
Event: a worker lifts a black garment with both hands and moves it to the upper-left side of the worktable
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
